{{CargoRelic
|name=Mount Hua Postcard
|class_id=20944
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=A commemorative postcard specially created by the dev team, featuring high-definition photos showcasing the beauty of Mount Hua. It would make a perfect souvenir for yourself and your friends who have never witnessed the beauty of Mount Hua!
|fame=33
|art=17
|fth=12
|civ=14
|tech=14
|ss1=Per Realm conquered, Snail HP +40<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +4<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss2=Per Realm conquered, Snail HP +80<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +8<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss3=Per Realm conquered, Snail HP +120<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +12<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss4=Per Realm conquered, Snail HP +120<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +12<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8
|ss7=Per Realm conquered, Snail HP +120<br>Per Realm conquered, Snail ATK +12<br>Realms Conquered: 8/8<br> (Awakened)
}}
